section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: What it provides
section.p: The picker runtime is an Open UI document field extension embedded inside the brXM CMS editor. It lets editors search Discovery data visually and store product IDs, widget IDs, or category IDs in document fields without exposing Discovery credentials to the browser.

tr.td: Search products for the product picker dialog.
Resolve one or more specific product IDs.
Return preview products for an editor-selected category.

section.name: Category product preview
section.p: discoveryCategoryProductPreview is the inline companion field used by the category picker flow. It stores a thumbnail count, listens for category changes via postMessage, and reloads preview products immediately without waiting for a document save.

div.source: /my-product-ref: jcr:primaryType: frontend:plugin caption: 'Featured Product' field: 'myns:productId' plugin.class: 'org.onehippo.cms7.frontend.plugin.field.OpenUiStringFieldPlugin' uiExtension: 'discoveryProductPicker' wicket.id: '${cluster.id}.field'

tr.td: brxm-discovery-cms is missing or the daemon module did not start.
The property was not declared in the document type definition.
Preview thumbnails do not follow category changes
The category picker and preview field are not rendered as same-origin sibling iframes.
